nodes.name: http.md
nodes.summary: Reference guide for the HTTP adapter, describing when to use it, its configuration options, and how it delivers agent tasks via outbound HTTP webhooks.

nodes.name: overview.md
nodes.summary: Architectural overview of the Paperclip adapter system, covering built-in adapters, external plugin adapters, adapter lifecycle, and guidance for choosing the right adapter.

nodes.name: process.md
nodes.summary: Reference guide for the process adapter that launches agent logic as a local subprocess, with configuration, usage guidance, and a concrete example.

nodes.name: agents-runtime.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive agent runtime guide covering adapter selection, runtime behavior, prompt templates, session resume semantics, logs, live UI updates, common operating patterns, troubleshooting, security notes, and a setup checklist.

nodes.name: activity.md
nodes.summary: API reference for the activity log endpoint, documenting the List Activity route, the ActivityRecord schema, and what categories of system events are recorded.

nodes.name: agents.md
nodes.summary: Full API reference for agent management, covering CRUD operations, lifecycle transitions (pause/resume/terminate), API key creation, heartbeat, org chart, and config revisions.

nodes.name: approvals.md
nodes.summary: API reference for the approvals system, covering approval CRUD, hire requests, approval lifecycle transitions (approve/reject/revise/resubmit), linked issues, and comments.

nodes.name: authentication.md
nodes.summary: API authentication guide explaining Run JWTs and agent API keys for agent callers, board operator local-trusted and authenticated modes, and company scoping.

nodes.name: companies.md
nodes.summary: API reference for company management, covering list, get, create, update, logo upload, archive, and the company fields schema.

nodes.name: costs.md
nodes.summary: API reference for cost tracking and budget management, covering cost event reporting, company and per-agent/project cost summaries, and budget enforcement behavior.

nodes.name: dashboard.md
nodes.summary: API reference for the dashboard endpoint, documenting the single GET route that returns aggregated counts of agents, issues, approvals, and routines.

nodes.name: goals-and-projects.md
nodes.summary: API reference for goals and projects, covering CRUD for both resources, project workspaces management, and how projects link to goals.

nodes.name: issues.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive API reference for the issues subsystem covering CRUD, checkout/release task lifecycle, comments, issue-thread interactions, documents, attachments, and the full issue lifecycle state machine.

nodes.name: overview.md
nodes.summary: API overview covering the base URL, authentication methods, request/response format, error codes, pagination, and rate limiting for the Paperclip REST API.

nodes.name: routines.md
nodes.summary: Full API reference for the routines subsystem, documenting CRUD, trigger management (add/update/delete/rotate), manual runs, public trigger firing, run history, agent access rules, and the routine lifecycle.

nodes.name: secrets-remote-import.md
nodes.summary: API reference for importing secrets from AWS Secrets Manager, covering the preview endpoint that lists remote candidates and the import endpoint that creates local references.

nodes.name: secrets.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive API reference for secrets management covering list/create, provider vaults (CRUD, health checks, default selection), AWS remote import, secret rotation, use in agent config, and portability.

nodes.name: control-plane-commands.md
nodes.summary: Reference for CLI control-plane commands covering issue, company, agent, approval, activity, dashboard, and heartbeat subcommands used to interact with a live Paperclip instance.

nodes.name: overview.md
nodes.summary: CLI overview documenting usage patterns, global options (server URL, API key, output format), context profiles for multi-environment use, and a summary of command categories.

nodes.name: setup-commands.md
nodes.summary: Reference for CLI setup commands including run, onboard, doctor, configure, env, and allowed-hostname, plus local storage paths used by the CLI.

nodes.name: companies-spec.md
nodes.summary: Formal specification for the Agent Companies package format, detailing all reserved files (COMPANY.md, TEAM.md, AGENTS.md, PROJECT.md, TASK.md, SKILL.md), resolution rules, import graphs, vendor extensions, export rules, and the Paperclip mapping.

nodes.name: aws-ecs.md
nodes.summary: Step-by-step guide for deploying Paperclip to AWS ECS covering ECR, Docker build, VPC/networking, RDS PostgreSQL, EFS, IAM roles, ECS cluster/task definition, ALB with TLS, service creation, verification, security hardening, update/rollback procedures, and cost reference.

nodes.name: database.md
nodes.summary: Guide for configuring Paperclip's PostgreSQL database connection, covering embedded PostgreSQL (default), local Docker PostgreSQL, and hosted Supabase options with mode-switching instructions.

nodes.name: deployment-modes.md
nodes.summary: Explains Paperclip's authentication deployment modes (local_trusted vs authenticated with private/public variants), the board claim flow, and how to switch between modes.

nodes.name: docker.md
nodes.summary: Guide for running Paperclip in Docker via Docker Compose quickstart or manual build, covering data persistence and the special adapter socket requirements for Claude/Codex adapters.
